Here is what the article covers:

**"Growing Up in China"** — written by Eric Rosenblum, published on the Leap.ai Medium publication on June 2, 2017.

**Who he is:** Rosenblum spent 14 years building companies in China starting in 1992. In 2004, a personal crisis (his son's birth defects, his mother's cancer) forced him to relocate to the US at age 37, unsure how his China-focused startup experience would translate.
